title: Lead AI Solution Developer
company_focus:
Real estate and mortgage industry services and technology
solutions
description:
Company Description

Altisource Portfolio Solutions S.A. (NASDAQ: ASPS) is an
integrated service provider and marketplace for the real
estate and mortgage industries. Combining operational
excellence with a suite of innovative products and
technologies, Altisource helps solve the demands of the
ever-changing market. Additional information is available at
altisource.com.

Job Description

- Deep experience building LLM-based systems (retrieval,
  agents, workflow orchestration, API chaining)
- Strong grounding in Python and/or Java and one enterprise
  framework (Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, or equivalent)
- Ability to architect reusable components for document
  intelligence, workflow automation, and copilots
- Familiarity with vector databases, embeddings, evaluation
  frameworks, and prompt engineering best practices
- Design and implement guardrails, safe execution patterns,
  and quality gates
- Knowledge of cloud platforms, microservices, serverless, and
  DevOps practices
- Comfortable translating business problems into scalable AI
  pipelines

Qualifications

Experience

- 6+ years software engineering, 2+ years hands-on LLM/GenAI
  development
- Building agentic automation systems or production LLM apps
  in enterprise context
- Leading small cross-functional engineering pods
- Prior work with enterprise datasets, unstructured data,
  PDFs, OCR, structured checklists
- Experience driving architectural decisions and mentoring
  engineers
- Familiarity with secure data handling and compliance (e.g.,
  role-based access, logging, auditability)

Additional Information

THE PERKS OF WORKING AT ALTISOURCE

Prosperity:

- Competitive base salaries!
- 401k plans with company matching – we want to empower you to
  further your career, and prepare for retirement!

Good Health:

- Comprehensive Medical, Dental, and Vision insurance plans
- Tax-free Flexible Spending Account
- Life insurance, short-term, and long-term disability

...And Happiness!

- Paid holidays, plus 19 days of accrued PTO for a total of 28
  paid days off per year!
- Free snacks, drinks and coffee!
- Plenty of employee engagement activities including sporting
  events, happy hours, and other fun team-building
  activities
- Opportunities to join our community service initiatives,
  including Habitat for Humanity
responsibilities: Build LLM-based systems including retrieval, agents, workflow orchestration, and API chaining
Architect reusable components for document intelligence, workflow automation, and copilots
Design and implement guardrails, safe execution patterns, and quality gates for AI systems
Translate business problems into scalable AI pipelines
Lead cross-functional engineering pods and mentor engineers
Drive architectural decisions for AI solutions
Implement secure data handling and compliance measures including role-based access and auditability
use_cases: Workflow automation for real estate and mortgage industries
Unstructured data processing including PDFs and OCR
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role directly involves building LLM-based systems
including agents, RAG, and workflow orchestration. The
position requires hands-on GenAI development with 2+ years
specifically in LLM/GenAI, focusing on implementing
production LLM apps and agentic automation systems.
